title: Love Bites
why_this_song: Love Bites by Def Leppard (1987) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 11 times; first heard in: "Do you tell lies? And say that it's forever?"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Love bites"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "I don't want to touch you too much, baby"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "Who do you think of, does he look like me?"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "Do you think twice or just touch and see?"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "it's" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "it's" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "bites" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "bites" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: If you've got love in your sights
When I'm with you, are you somewhere else?

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: When you're alone, do you let go?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Love Bites" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Love Bites" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Love Bites", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Love Bites", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Love Bites" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Love Bites" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
